claims.evidence_text: Benchmark: 122ºC days/leaf (14 main shoot leaves) ... A phyllochron is the time period – measured in thermal time (ºC days above a base temperature of 0ºC) – between the emergence of two successive leaves.
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat phyllochron benchmark is 122 degree-days per leaf (base 0C), with up to 14 main shoot leaves.

claims.evidence_text: measured in thermal time (ºC days above a base temperature of 0ºC) – between the emergence of two successive leaves.
claims.claim_summary: Base temperature used for thermal-time (phyllochron) calculations in winter wheat leaf emergence is 0 C.

claims.evidence_text: Benchmark: Maximum 35 shoots/plant for October-drilled crop
claims.claim_summary: Maximum benchmark of 35 shoots per plant for an October-drilled winter wheat crop.

claims.evidence_text: Benchmark: 1,020 shoots/m 2 (8 April, GS30–31) for a late September to early October-sown crop with 260 plants/m 2
claims.claim_summary: Benchmark shoot density of 1,020 shoots/m2 at GS30-31 for a late Sept/early Oct-sown winter wheat crop with 260 plants/m2.

claims.evidence_text: It is usually necessary to establish at least 150 plants/m 2 to ensure 400 ears/m 2 from an October-sown crop.
claims.claim_summary: At least 150 plants/m2 must be established to ensure 400 ears/m2 from an October-sown winter wheat crop.

claims.evidence_text: It is usually necessary to establish at least 150 plants/m 2 to ensure 400 ears/m 2 from an October-sown crop.
claims.claim_summary: Target ear (spike) density of 400 ears/m2 for an October-sown winter wheat crop.

claims.evidence_text: Tillering normally ends when Green Area Index (GAI) reaches about 1. In dense crops, this usually occurs just before growth stage 31.
claims.claim_summary: Tillering in winter wheat normally ends when Green Area Index reaches about 1, typically just before GS31.

claims.evidence_text: Late sowing decreases both phyllochron and total leaves emerged – e.g. early September drilling may give 15 leaves, while November drilling may give nine leaves.
claims.claim_summary: Total main-shoot leaves emerged in winter wheat range from ~15 (early September drilling) to nine (November drilling).
